workspace.offlineDescription: Start memory-native-agent first, then refresh this page. Suggested command: `axis start`.

bootstrap.mna_not_running: memory-native-agent was not detected. Start the local service first.
bootstrap.token_missing: No usable token was found. Make sure mna is running and the token file exists.
bootstrap.token_invalid: The token could not be used. Check the token file or restart mna.

workspace.dependencyEmptyDescription: Runtime, provider, and MCP status will appear here once loaded.
workspace.replayGapTitle: Connection recovered, but some events were lost
workspace.replayGapDescription: The reconnect flow could not replay every event. Existing content is preserved and you can continue sending messages.

chatPanel.title: Talk to `memory-native-agent` directly from this page.
chatPanel.emptyDescription: After the first message, this view will show the injection banner, phase trace, streamed assistant output, and tool logs.
chatPanel.providerNotConfiguredTitle: Primary chat model is not configured
chatPanel.providerNotConfiguredDescription: Configure a provider in settings before sending messages.
chatPanel.embeddingNotConfiguredDescription: Chat remains available, but memory retrieval will be degraded until embedding is configured in settings.
chatPanel.placeholder: Type a message. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line

slash.title: Available commands
slash.skill: Invoke an imported skill by name

descriptions.confirm: Tools that require approval will pause and wait for confirmation before they run.
descriptions.yolo: Tools run directly without per-call confirmation. High-risk actions are also allowed through.

runtimeConfig.title: Runtime config
runtimeConfig.mcpEmpty: No MCP server is configured yet.
runtimeConfig.saveEmbeddingBeforeCheck: Save the current embedding config before running the check.
runtimeConfig.saveMemoryLlmBeforeCheck: Save the current memory llm config before running the check.

setupWizard.title: Configure chat model
setupWizard.description: The primary chat model is not configured yet. Complete these 3 steps to start chatting.
setupWizard.apiKeyEnvDetected: Detected {name}; it can be used directly.
setupWizard.ollamaNoApiKey: Local Ollama does not need an API Key.

providers.openai: Use the official OpenAI Responses API.

errors.providerBaseUrlRequired: base_url is required for the selected provider.
errors.providerApiKeyRequired: api_key is required for the selected provider.
errors.providerMaxTokensInvalid: provider max output tokens must be a positive integer.
errors.embeddingModelRequired: EMBEDDING_MODEL is required when EMBEDDING_BASE_URL is set.
errors.memoryLlmModelRequired: MEMORY_LLM_MODEL is required when MEMORY_LLM_BASE_URL is set.
errors.memoryLlmFollowUnsupported: The current primary chat model cannot be mirrored directly as the memory model. Switch to custom mode.
errors.memoryLlmTimeoutInvalid: MEMORY_LLM_TIMEOUT_MS must be a positive integer.
errors.memoryLlmMaxTokensInvalid: memory llm max output tokens must be a positive integer.
errors.governanceIntervalInvalid: Automatic governance scan interval must be a positive integer number of minutes.
errors.governanceMaxActionsInvalid: Max actions per scan must be an integer between 1 and 20.

sessionList.emptyTitle: No session yet. Once you send the first message, recent sessions will stay here.

fileTree.title: File tree
fileTree.uploadHint: Pick a folder and its contents will render below immediately.
fileTree.pickFolderPendingHint: The native folder picker is opening. If no dialog is visible, check whether another window is covering it.
fileTree.pickError: Failed to open the folder picker. Make sure memory-native-agent is updated and restarted.
fileTree.openDirectoryError: Could not open this folder. Try again later.
fileTree.openFileError: Could not open this file. Try again later.

toolConsole.title: Tool console
toolConsole.description: Inspect tool status, output previews, and trust labels for every call.
toolConsole.emptyDescription: When the agent triggers file, shell, or MCP tools, execution logs will show up here.

memoryPanel.title: Memory panel
memoryPanel.description: Shows the actual injected memory summary and matched records for the active turn.
memoryPanel.emptyTitle: No injection block in the current turn
memoryPanel.emptyDescription: When memory is matched and injected for this turn, the injection summary and matched records will appear here.
memoryPanel.recordsEmpty: No detailed records in this turn.

token_invalid.title: Authentication failed
token_invalid.description: The current token is invalid or no longer accepted. Fetch a new token and try again.

token_expired.title: Token expired
token_expired.description: The current token has expired. Restart or re-authorize before reconnecting.

session_not_found.title: Session not found
session_not_found.description: The target session does not exist. It may have been deleted or the link is stale.

turn_not_found.title: Turn not found
turn_not_found.description: The requested turn does not exist, so its context or debug payload cannot be loaded.

workspace_mismatch.title: Workspace mismatch
workspace_mismatch.description: This session does not belong to the current workspace. Verify the working directory and session source.

runtime_unavailable.title: Retrieval runtime unavailable
runtime_unavailable.description: The retrieval runtime is unavailable right now, so the page will stay in degraded mode.

provider_not_registered.title: Provider not registered
provider_not_registered.description: The selected provider is not registered. Check the provider configuration.

provider_auth_failed.title: Provider authentication failed
provider_auth_failed.description: The model provider rejected authentication. Check the API key or auth settings.

provider_rate_limited.title: Provider rate limited
provider_rate_limited.description: The model provider returned a rate limit response. Try again later.

provider_timeout.title: Provider timeout
provider_timeout.description: The provider did not answer within the configured timeout window.

provider_stream_error.title: Provider stream interrupted
provider_stream_error.description: The provider failed while streaming output, so this turn ended early.

memory_writeback_incomplete.title: Memory was not saved
memory_writeback_incomplete.description: The memory writeback flow did not complete. This reply is unaffected.

reasons.runtime_timeout: The memory runtime timed out. This reply is unaffected.
reasons.runtime_unavailable: The memory runtime is currently unavailable. This reply is unaffected.
reasons.storage_write_failed: Memory storage failed to save the writeback. This reply is unaffected.
reasons.network_error: The memory service connection failed. This reply is unaffected.
reasons.invalid_request: The memory writeback request was malformed. This reply is unaffected.
reasons.invalid_response: The memory runtime returned an invalid response. This reply is unaffected.
reasons.unknown: The memory writeback flow failed unexpectedly. This reply is unaffected.

tool_denied_path.title: Tool path denied
tool_denied_path.description: The requested path is outside the allowed workspace boundary, so the tool call was blocked.

tool_denied_pattern.title: Tool command denied
tool_denied_pattern.description: The request matched a blocked command pattern, so the tool call was rejected.

tool_confirm_timeout.title: Tool confirmation timed out
tool_confirm_timeout.description: Permission was not granted before the timeout, so the tool call was cancelled.

mcp_disconnected.title: MCP disconnected
mcp_disconnected.description: The MCP server is currently unavailable. Restore the connection and try again.

abort_ack.title: Abort acknowledged
abort_ack.description: The current turn has accepted the abort request and additional output will stop.

session_store_unavailable.title: Session store unavailable
session_store_unavailable.description: The session store is currently unavailable, so some session reads and writes may fail.

api_version_mismatch.title: API version mismatch
api_version_mismatch.description: The client and server API versions do not match. Upgrade to compatible versions.

mcpPanel.title: MCP servers
mcpPanel.description: Inspect current connection state and trigger restart or disable directly.
mcpPanel.empty: No MCP server is configured right now.

promptInspector.title: Prompt Inspector
promptInspector.description: Inspect the messages and tools sent to the provider for the current turn.
promptInspector.noInjection: No memory injected in this phase

confirmDialog.title: Permission required
confirmDialog.description: Tool {tool} wants to execute. The run will continue only after you confirm it.
confirmDialog.planDescription: This turn generated an execution plan first. It will continue only after you confirm it.
confirmDialog.revisionFeedbackPlaceholder: Describe what should change before continuing.
